title: Snickety Snap
poem_text:
Jitter jig the wobble woo,
Bounce the bump and tickle true.
Fizzle pop the snickety snap,
Zip the zap and flip the flap.
Dizzy dazzle whirligig,
Spin the sprock and twirl the twig.
Pitter pat the sleepy snug,
Dream the hug in fuzzy rug.
cover_context: A glowing, swirling night sky where tiny, bouncing creatures made of light play among the stars before curling up in a cozy, moonlit nest.
style_prompt: Children's musical poem, ukulele and soft bongos, 115 BPM, bouncy and playful, fun energy that channels into rhythm, clear warm vocal, every word easy to understand
